c42fd6d5-c5a8-4ee9-a72a-7d1a738f0af5.label: text_chunk
c42fd6d5-c5a8-4ee9-a72a-7d1a738f0af5.text:
BUYER ’S CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
_______________

1. DEFINITIONS AND INTERPRETATION

1.1 In this Agreement, unless the context clearly indicates otherwise,

 the following terms shall have the meanings assigned to them hereunder:

1.1.

7ef4d3b5-8637-4590-b6f5-744857b4b9d3.label: text_chunk
7ef4d3b5-8637-4590-b6f5-744857b4b9d3.text:
1.1 “ Aldes ” – means and includes Aldes Business Brokers Franchise Africa (Pty) Ltd (Registration Number: 2006/036900/07) and any and all of its subsidiaries, any and all of its holding companies, any other entities forming part of its group of companies and/or any and all of its franchisees from time to time, or any one of them as the context may require;

1.1.

faf6142e-b5d8-47e3-b067-70e4762fa3f3.label: text_chunk
faf6142e-b5d8-47e3-b067-70e4762fa3f3.text:
1.2 “ Business/es ” – means such assets (whether tangible or intangible), business/es and/or entity/ies (albeit close corporations, partnerships, trusts, private companies, public companies, joint ventures, sole proprietors and/or otherwise) introduced by Aldes to the Buyer for sale (albeit as is listed for sale on the Aldes database or website or otherwise);

1.1.

da4917ce-e490-4f0a-9769-566db3af1815.label: text_chunk

1cb39fe0-c51c-4256-8779-b0f273b68e24.label: text_chunk

d6f4de72-da17-426f-a6c4-65694a43419e.label: text_chunk
d6f4de72-da17-426f-a6c4-65694a43419e.text:
1.2 In this Agreement, unless the context clearly indicates a contrary intention,

 words in the singular shall include the plural and vice versa , words in the masculine gender shall include the feminine and neuter gender and vice versa, and a reference to natural persons shall include created entities (corporate and unincorporated) and vice versa .

1.

89feb93f-7a68-4050-9541-a6c3800d3655.label: text_chunk
89feb93f-7a68-4050-9541-a6c3800d3655.text: 3 The expiration or termination of this Agreement shall not affect such of the provisions of this Agreement as expressly provide that they will operate  after  any  such expiration or  termination or  which of  necessity  must  continue  to  have  effect  after  such expiration or  termination, notwithstanding that the clauses themselves do not expressly provide for this.

bbf27aa1-ee9e-4835-b4c2-b859f7d987ad.label: text_chunk
bbf27aa1-ee9e-4835-b4c2-b859f7d987ad.text:
1.4 The terms of this Agreement, having been negotiated,

 shall not be interpreted against the person/entity who procured its preparation and drafting, nor shall exclusion clauses contained in this Agreement be construed against the person/entity relying on same.

1.5 This Agreement shall be governed by,

 construed and interpreted in accordance with the law of the Republic of South Africa.

59a2d0ff-19fb-4905-bbe5-0e1c541ae5a7.label: text_chunk
59a2d0ff-19fb-4905-bbe5-0e1c541ae5a7.text:
1.6 This Agreement constitutes a stipulatio alteri (namely,

 a benefit in favor of a third party which may be accepted by such third party) in favor of the Business/es and the Seller/s, the benefits of which may be accepted by them at any time.

2. BACKGROUND

2.

19172ee6-1e58-44ad-a233-43fbe1afe748.label: text_chunk
19172ee6-1e58-44ad-a233-43fbe1afe748.text: 1 The Buyer records that it is (and/or has been and/or will be) partaking in investigations of (and/or negotiations with) various Seller/s and/or Business/es, with a view towards potentially acquiring such Business/es. The Buyer further acknowledges that it is serious in its investigations towards potentially acquiring a Business.

f54ec7d2-39ba-44db-9cea-f91339acc603.label: text_chunk
f54ec7d2-39ba-44db-9cea-f91339acc603.text:
2.2 The Buyer realises that,

 in the course of its investigations (and/or negotiations), Aldes, the Business/es and/or the Seller/s will be required to disclose  Confidential  Information  and/or  Confidential  Material  to  the  Buyer,  albeit  for  the  purposes  of  assisting  the  Buyer  in  determining whether or not it wishes to acquire any Business/es or otherwise.

95f3122c-edde-4bb9-98b3-526bfca3a293.label: text_chunk
95f3122c-edde-4bb9-98b3-526bfca3a293.text:
2.3 The  Buyer  acknowledges and agrees that  the  sole  reason for,

  and  the  sole  purpose  of,  any  disclosures of  Confidential  Information  and/or Confidential Material by Aldes, the Business/es and/or the Seller/s is strictly limited to that stated in clauses 2.1 and 2.2 above (the “ Purpose ”).

3.

99b7814b-4f5c-427a-b16c-64921b44c4e6.label: text_chunk
99b7814b-4f5c-427a-b16c-64921b44c4e6.text:
PERIOD

3.1 This Agreement shall be taken to have commenced, notwithstanding the signature date hereof,

 on the earliest of:

3.1.1 the date of signature of this agreement by the Buyer; or

3.1.

2 the date of the first meeting or correspondence between Aldes and the Buyer regarding any Business/es and/or Seller/s; and shall continue in perpetuity thereafter.

4. UNDERTAKING OF CONFIDENTIALITY

4.

5646f277-8511-4c42-8ded-4cae3d145563.label: text_chunk
5646f277-8511-4c42-8ded-4cae3d145563.text:
1 The Buyer undertakes, towards and in favour of each of Aldes,

 the Business/es and the Seller/s (jointly and severally), with regard to and in respect of any and all of the Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, that it will  keep same (irrespective of how same was disclosed to the Buyer) strictly confidential and secret and that it will hold same in absolute trust and confidence.

a6c5ed7d-9457-4552-a795-11d93a56fccc.label: text_chunk
a6c5ed7d-9457-4552-a795-11d93a56fccc.text:
Initial
_______________

BUYER’S CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

4.

2 The Seller/s and/or the Business/es shall retain ownership of all their Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, which shall be deemed to be lent to the Buyer for the Purpose only.

5.

c4acdd31-2c93-42fe-a8e6-56752bf15cf0.label: text_chunk
c4acdd31-2c93-42fe-a8e6-56752bf15cf0.text:
LIABILITY

5.1 The  Buyer  acknowledges  that  it  will  be  liable,

  responsible  and  accountable  to  each  of  Aldes,  the  Business/es  and  the  Seller/s  (jointly  and severally) for a breach of this Agreement by itself or any of its related or inter related parties, employees, consultants, advisers and/or agents.

6. NON-CIRCUMVENT

6.

0dbfa2af-651b-4d6b-b64b-775f5c2056aa.label: text_chunk
0dbfa2af-651b-4d6b-b64b-775f5c2056aa.text:
1 The Buyer acknowledges that Aldes will be deemed and regarded (and will be) the effective cause of any transaction which may  transpire and/or materialise between the Buyer and any Business/es and/or Seller/s.

6.

fdf013ce-7e66-4ce9-9926-a804da6e416f.label: text_chunk
fdf013ce-7e66-4ce9-9926-a804da6e416f.text: 2 The Buyer warrants and guarantees that it will never circumvent Aldes (albeit directly itself or indirectly through any of its subsidiaries, holding companies,  group  companies,  related  parties  and/or  inter-related  parties  or  otherwise  indirectly),  in  negotiating  or  concluding  any transactions,  arrangements  and/or  agreements contemplated in clauses  2.1  and/or  2.

94fbd0d7-365b-4b19-ab51-9031bb3ff3c6.label: text_chunk
94fbd0d7-365b-4b19-ab51-9031bb3ff3c6.text:
2  above  with (or  with regard to)  any  Seller/s and/or Business/es. For avoidance of doubt, the Buyer will at all times act in good faith and will only transact and deal with Seller/s and/or Business/es, via the brokerage, intervention and mediation of Aldes.

6.3 The Buyer acknowledges and agrees that Aldes is,

f9c8c737-0bc2-42fa-bb9d-5ec15e3af88d.label: text_chunk
f9c8c737-0bc2-42fa-bb9d-5ec15e3af88d.text: will be and will remain entitled to receipt of its agreed brokerage commission (albeit due and payable by the Seller/s, the Business/es, the Buyer or any of them), should the Buyer (albeit directly itself or indirectly through any of its subsidiaries, holding companies, group companies, related parties and/or inter-related parties or otherwise indirectly) or anyone else the Buyer may have introduced to the Business/es and/or Seller/s, conclude any agreements and/or transactions contemplated in clauses 2.

c17d47eb-267b-4a8a-a358-105d2d7d238f.label: text_chunk
c17d47eb-267b-4a8a-a358-105d2d7d238f.text:
1 and/or 2.2 above with (or with regard to) any Business/es and/or Seller/s.

7. GENERAL

7.

1 No alteration or variation to or of this Agreement shall be of any force or effect unless it is recorded in writing and signed by the Buyer and Aldes.

f8537768-20cc-4fa1-b64f-0347a18a7caf.label: text_chunk
f8537768-20cc-4fa1-b64f-0347a18a7caf.text:
7.2 Any indulgence,

 latitude or extension of time which may be allowed by either of Aldes, the Seller/s and/or the Business/es shall not under any circumstances be taken as preventing any of them from exercising their rights contained in this Agreement.

8. BUYER’S INFORMATION

8.

264c92e0-b246-4ae4-898a-4c45cb9ba5df.label: text_chunk
264c92e0-b246-4ae4-898a-4c45cb9ba5df.text: 1 The Buyer notes that Aldes’ decision to introduce any Business/es for sale to the Buyer (and the Seller/s and/or Business/es decision to enter into discussions with the Buyer) is, in part, based on the information presented by the Buyer under and in terms of the Buyer’s Profile on the face of this Agreement.

6423d19a-9081-4a06-af61-578964d273b0.label: text_chunk
6423d19a-9081-4a06-af61-578964d273b0.text:
As such, the Buyer warrants and guarantees that all information presented and provided via and in terms of the Buyer’s Profile  was,  is  and  will  remain  true,  complete  and  accurate  and  that  it  will  immediately  inform  Aldes  should  there  be  any  change  in  the information provided/presented.

9.

c9bd4701-a1b4-46d3-bf6a-8bc1401b6c9d.label: text_chunk
c9bd4701-a1b4-46d3-bf6a-8bc1401b6c9d.text:
FURTHER CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENTS

9.1 Aldes may from time to time, dependant on the nature,

 scope and extent of information to be provided to the Buyer, require that the Buyer enter into and conclude further and/or additional confidentiality and non-disclosure agreements.

59d08bf6-45d8-4bfb-ad0f-900d247bd25a.label: text_chunk
59d08bf6-45d8-4bfb-ad0f-900d247bd25a.text:
Should the Buyer fail and/or refuse to enter into and conclude such further agreements, Aldes may, in its sole and absolute discretion, refuse to disclose further information to the Buyer regarding any and/or all Seller/s and/or Business/es.

9.

2 It is noted and agreed that the Buyer and certain of the Seller/s and/or Business/es may from time to time enter into and conclude one or more confidentiality and/or non-disclosure agreements amongst, by and between themselves.

0934576c-bffa-4341-beeb-181eebddb6be.label: text_chunk
0934576c-bffa-4341-beeb-181eebddb6be.text: It is noted and agreed that those agreements will be in addition to, and not in substitution of/for, this Agreement.

6cb0c1b8-8ab8-41a9-9f2f-396b55ef2037.label: text_chunk
6cb0c1b8-8ab8-41a9-9f2f-396b55ef2037.text:

community_summary.0: In this relationship, the **Buyer** is bound by a **Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreement**. This indicates that the Buyer has a legal obligation to adhere to the terms set forth in the agreement, which emphasizes the importance of maintaining confidentiality regarding sensitive information. The relationship underscores the Buyer's commitment to protecting confidential information as stipulated in the agreement.
community_summary.1:
**Summary of Relationships:**

Aldes Business Brokers Franchise Africa (Pty) Ltd is a corporate entity that has established subsidiaries as part of its organizational structure. This indicates a significant relationship where Aldes Business Brokers Franchise Africa (Pty) Ltd oversees and manages these subsidiary entities, reflecting its role in expanding its business operations and maintaining control over its various branches.
community_summary.2:
**Summary of Relationships Involving Aldes, Buyer, and Seller:**

1. **Transactional Relationship**: Aldes introduces various assets and businesses for sale to the Buyer, establishing a direct transactional relationship where Aldes acts as an intermediary.

2. **Confidential Information Disclosure**: Aldes discloses Confidential Information to the Buyer on behalf of the Seller(s), facilitating the acquisition process. This includes sharing Confidential Material as part of the transaction.

3. **Engagement in Business Discussions**: Aldes and the Buyer are engaged in ongoing discussions or transactions regarding business matters, indicating active collaboration.

4. **Mediation Role**: Aldes serves as a mediator between the Buyer and the Seller, facilitating the transaction process and ensuring smooth communication.

5. **Seller Involvement**: Aldes may also act as a Seller in the context of the agreement, indicating its direct involvement in the transaction dynamics.

6. **Confidentiality Requirements**: Aldes requires the Buyer to enter into confidentiality and non-disclosure agreements, emphasizing the importance of protecting sensitive information.

7. **Discretionary Authority**: Aldes retains the authority to refuse information disclosure to the Buyer if confidentiality agreements are not adhered to, highlighting its control over the transaction process.

8. **Consent for Agreement Modifications**: Aldes must provide specific prior written consent for any alterations to the terms of the agreement, indicating a relationship of authority and oversight over the contractual terms.

Overall, the relationships illustrate Aldes' pivotal role as an intermediary and facilitator in transactions between Buyers and Sellers, while also emphasizing the importance of confidentiality and formal agreements in these interactions.
community_summary.3:
**Summary of Relationships Involving the Buyer, Seller, Aldes, and Business/es:**

1. **Confidential Information Exchange**: The Buyer receives and accesses Confidential Information from Aldes, Sellers, and/or Businesses, which is crucial for evaluating potential acquisitions. This indicates a reliance on sensitive data to inform decision-making.

2. **Negotiation and Acquisition Activities**: The Buyer is actively engaged in negotiations with various Sellers to explore acquisition opportunities and is investigating the possibility of acquiring Businesses. This reflects a strategic interest in expanding ownership through potential acquisitions.

3. **Transactional Engagements**: The Buyer engages in transactions with Sellers, purchasing goods or services. This establishes a direct transactional relationship where the Buyer is liable to the Sellers for any breaches of agreement.

4. **Accountability and Communication**: The Buyer is accountable to Aldes for any breaches of agreements and is obligated to inform Aldes of any changes in the information provided. This highlights a communication relationship and the importance of transparency in their dealings.

5. **Recognition of Aldes' Role**: The Buyer acknowledges Aldes' influence in facilitating transactions, indicating a recognition of Aldes as a key player in the acquisition and purchasing processes.

Overall, the relationships illustrate a complex interplay between the Buyer, Sellers, Aldes, and Businesses, characterized by negotiations, transactions, accountability, and the exchange of critical information necessary for informed decision-making in acquisitions.
community_summary.4:
The relationships outlined involve Sellers and Buyers in the context of business transactions concerning Confidential Materials. 

1. **Sellers and Confidential Materials**: Sellers may possess Confidential Materials as part of their business operations, highlighting their role in managing sensitive information essential for transactions.

2. **Sellers and Buyers**: Sellers engage with Buyers in transactions that involve Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, indicating a direct interaction where sensitive data is exchanged or utilized.

Overall, the relationships emphasize the critical role of Sellers in handling Confidential Materials and their active engagement with Buyers in business dealings that require confidentiality.
community_summary.5: It seems that there was no information provided for me to summarize. Please provide the set of relationships or any specific details you'd like me to work with, and I'll be happy to create a summary for you!
community_summary.6:
The relationships outlined involve three key entities: The Buyer, Aldes, and the Seller. 

1. **The Buyer and Aldes**: The Buyer receives confidential information from Aldes, which must be kept confidential according to their agreement. Additionally, The Buyer warrants and guarantees that they will not bypass Aldes in any negotiations or transactions, thereby establishing a protective relationship that safeguards Aldes' interests.

2. **The Buyer and Seller**: The Buyer engages with the Seller in a transaction that also involves confidential information. This indicates a business relationship between The Buyer and the Seller, highlighting the collaborative nature of their dealings.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the importance of confidentiality and legal obligations in the interactions between The Buyer, Aldes, and the Seller, ensuring that all parties are protected and that their business dealings are conducted with integrity.
community_summary.7:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Seller and Buyer**: The Seller and Buyer are engaged in a transactional relationship where the Seller provides goods or services to the Buyer. This relationship is characterized by direct interactions and mutual obligations.

community_summary.18:
### Summary of Relationships Involving Disclosers and Recipients

1. **Disclosers and Recipient**: The Disclosers provide confidential or commercially sensitive information to the Recipient, establishing a relationship based on trust and confidentiality. This relationship is governed by an agreement that outlines the terms of information sharing, ownership, and compliance obligations.

2. **Ownership and Control**: The Disclosers retain ownership of the Confidential Information and associated Intellectual Property Rights. They maintain control over the rights and obligations of the Recipient, who cannot transfer these rights without prior consent.

3. **Compliance and Notification**: The Disclosers require the Recipient to demonstrate compliance with confidentiality obligations and to notify them of any requests for disclosure, indicating a supervisory and communicative relationship.

4. **Affiliated Entities**: The Disclosers are associated with Group Members, indicating a shared organizational structure where information provided by the Disclosers may be utilized by these Group Members in their business activities.

5. **Entitlements and Remedies**: The Disclosers are entitled to specific remedies as outlined in the agreement in case of breaches by the Recipient, reinforcing the importance of adherence to the established terms.

Overall, the relationships highlight a structured framework of information sharing, ownership, compliance, and accountability between the Disclosers and the Recipient, with implications for affiliated entities within the same organizational context.
community_summary.19:
### Summary of Relationships Involving the Recipient and Disclosers

1. **Information Transfer**: The Recipient is set to receive Confidential Information from the Disclosers, establishing a direct dependency where the Recipient relies on the Disclosers for critical information under a legal agreement.

2. **Compliance and Responsibility**: The Recipient is responsible for ensuring that its Authorised Persons comply with the terms set by the Disclosers regarding the handling of confidential information. This includes oversight of their actions, as any unauthorized disclosure by them can lead to liability for the Recipient.

3. **Obligations and Duties**: The Recipient has several obligations towards the Disclosers:
   - To inform the Disclosers of any unauthorized access to the confidential information.
   - To assist the Disclosers in resisting any disclosure requirements, highlighting a collaborative effort to protect confidentiality.
   - To return or destroy materials containing Confidential Information upon written demand from the Disclosers.
   - To delete Confidential Information as required by the Disclosers, demonstrating a duty of care.
   - To pay all sums owed to the Disclosers under the terms of the Agreement, indicating a financial relationship.

4. **Acknowledgment of Terms**: The Recipient acknowledges the terms and conditions set forth in the Agreement, which defines its confidentiality obligations and the potential harm that breaches may cause to the Disclosers.

5. **Independence**: The Recipient does not have the authority to make commitments on behalf of the Disclosers, establishing a clear boundary of independence between the two parties.

Overall, the relationships highlight a structured framework of information sharing, compliance, and mutual obligations, with the Recipient playing a crucial role in safeguarding the confidentiality of the information provided by the Disclosers.

community_summary.22:
The summary of the relationships surrounding the Agreement is as follows:

1. **Parties Involved**: The Agreement involves one or more parties who are bound by its terms and conditions, establishing a legal relationship among them.

2. **Confidential Information**: The Agreement governs the use and protection of Confidential Information, outlining the legal framework for how such information should be handled by the parties.

3. **Binding Obligations**: The Agreement serves as a binding document for the Recipient, detailing the legal obligations and responsibilities that must be adhered to.

4. **Execution Requirement**: Each party must execute the Agreement for it to be valid, highlighting the necessity of mutual consent and commitment.

5. **Third-Party Rights**: The Agreement acknowledges the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Act 1999, indicating that it recognizes the rights of third parties in relation to its provisions.

6. **Governing Law**: The Agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales, meaning that any legal interpretations or disputes will be resolved under this jurisdiction.

7. **Exclusive Jurisdiction**: The Agreement specifies that the courts of England and Wales have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising from it, reinforcing the legal relationship between the document and the geographical location.

Overall, the Agreement establishes a comprehensive legal framework that binds the involved parties, protects confidential information, recognizes third-party rights, and delineates the governing laws and jurisdiction for any potential disputes.
